question: I am writing a Megatron-LM sbatch script for multi-node training on a pre-Blackwell (Hopper/Ampere) cluster with tensor-model-parallel-size 4 and pipeline-model-parallel-size 2 (no FSDP, no overlap_moe_expert_parallel_comm). From the run-on-slurm skill, what value should `CUDA_DEVICE_MAX_CONNECTIONS` be set to? Reply with a single bash export line.
expected_behavior: Sets the value to 1 for pre-Blackwell Hopper/Ampere with TP>1 and no FSDP
